svg.title: UML class diagram — bomb-core
svg.desc: Classes of the shared bomb-core library laid out in four columns: world model, entities, simulation, and wire protocol. GameWorld is the primary entry point and aggregates Arena, Players, Bombs, Explosions and PowerUpItems.
svg.text: GameWorld is the primary entry point. Solid open-triangle = inheritance, open diamond = aggregation, filled diamond = composition, plain arrow = association.
